reviews.review_title: This game is a cool/nice game
reviews.review_description: I love this game now 1 thing I don’t like is that it doesn’t save your data example so let’s say I’m fixing up a house and I’m in the middle of it and I have to get off if vr or go to the store something it restart the house your on. But besides that it’s a really good game for the price ￼￼ just fix the house up before you gotta go ￼

The mechanics are terrible,it looks like it was made for a kids show, the game gave me a headache before I completed the tutorial and it doesn’t even tell you what to do half of the time! Just buy the console version instead, it’s the same price but so much better

The game overall is enjoyable and very chill, though certain mechanisms and how unlocking things even works, or even simple explanations on what you need or how to do things like install toilets in a bathroomb with zero plumbing or any other fixture outlets works is a small issue.
The BIG issue, and one that consistently makes me have to quite and restart the game; is the buggy controls... The smaller (but utterly annoying) fault in the control scheme is holding items in your hand (ie; holding the Trigger button) completely BLOCKING your use of the right analogue stick, meaning ZERO virtual rotation of ANY kind. This really gets to me due to my very limited play-space that's not even truly big enough for me to spread my arms without extreme caution.. 
The bigger issue that seems an actual defect in the game and makes me have to restart? Randomly losing the use of directions (almost always Down + Right) I can move (meaning walking) using my left analog stick, which makes the game unplayable. Occasionally, it also randomly comes back, but much more often than not, I have to restart! 
One would think it's stick drift as I did at first, but literally no where else or any other game/ app does this EVER happen, so it's definitely nothing but this game..

Sadly the drvelopers I highly doubt will ever patch/ update the game ever again with it being dropped ages ago, I'm sure. So I can't fully say I recommend buying it if you're on the fence, but it's a decent and enjoyable relaxing title whenever your not forced to fight it's controls and/or mechanics.
Poor game

okay guys i really have always wanted to play house flipper and wanted a new vr game so I decided to get this.

It’s great, and very fun!! Except I beat it in about a week, less even. 

The tracking is really bad sometimes and the controls are a bit weird. Also the game itself is very different from the actual house flipper game. 

It hasn’t been updated in a while, still having christmas items in it and everything 

It was enjoyable and I had a fun time playing it but it was in no way worth the money, and i bought it on sale !!!


So I wouldn’t recommend it if you care about wasting money, if you don’t then i fully recommend it because aside from the things I listed it was a fun play.

reviews.review_title: Could easily be 5 stars with a patch
reviews.review_description:
The game is ruined by the fact that the same button is used to open a cupboard or fridge as is used to move them. Half the time I try to open one I end up throwing it across the room. Easily fixed, so Im especially frustrated the devs don't seem to agree with me.

Update:  Saw a new patch in July 2021. Nothing changed. I still throw my fridge across the room.

Update:  Dec 2021 patch, still not fixed.

reviews.review_title: I love it, but am disappointed
reviews.review_description: Now I've always wanted house flipper, but after I found out it was in VR I flipped (No joke intended) but when I looked at the screenshots I got disappointed. I was expecting it to look realistic like the normal game, but instead it was cartoon style. Now I know that some people like the art style, and I do to. But a cartoon style with THIS game, I'm just not feeling it. When I looked at youtube it got even WORSE when they played it on some other VR headset it was realisted looking, but on SPECIFICLY oculus quest 1 and 2 it wasn't. Now I'm not trying to be feisty, so I purchased the game and I still love it. But still that is a major thing that I'm just really really disappointed about. Thank for reading and 3 stars.

I purchased this game yesterday because I really wanted to try it, although when I did I had decided it wasn't completely worth my money as I am a little short right now so I had only played it for about 20 minutes and I haven't been able to get a refund on this game.

reviews.review_title: This game looked fun and was fun.
reviews.review_description: This game has so many bugs. I don't recommend buying this. If the creators worked on the game I wouldn't regret buying it. Please do some work on the game.
Game looks like a mobile knockoff of House flipper,very disappointed so far.Seems they sh*t out a game so they could sell on the vr market
Spray and wipe the counter, put dishes away, pick up trash. All made fun by this game! Don't pass on it!

This game is okay they did take out some of the good parts. I do think they should do another update. However I think they should give us more jobs to do and allowed us to replace the doors, windows, knock down wall and add on new wall to make more rooms in this games that’s the only down fall I see.
Read the title
This game is super fun and you get a small work out BUT I CAN'T CLOSE THE F#$& FRIDGE DOOR
It is an absolutely amazing game for relaxation
don’t buy this game, it is so bad i give him a 0

reviews.review_title: Can’t decorate the houses you buy
reviews.review_description: Games fun, took a while to get use to how everything works but as you do the various jobs you get the hang of it. Threw the random jobs you get more tools and the ability to buy furniture to decorate the homes in those jobs . That all works great however, when you go to purchase your own house to fix up and decorate to flip and sell, the menu always bugs out and won’t let you purchase paint for the walls or any furniture. This really disappointed me cause I feel like I went threw a lengthy tutorial to finally do the thing I was excited about and I couldn’t even do it. If the bug gets fixed I will gladly edit my review and give it more stars but right now it’s just cleaning simulator instead of house flipper.

This isn’t the best vr game, but it’s not really trying to be. There are a few problems, the tool belt is always behind you and the pickup mechanic is kind of weird, but other than that it’s fine and relaxing if you’re into that.

I wish I had read more of the reviews/watched some gameplay footage before buying this game. I'd seen a few videos of the desktop version and assumed this was the same, but nope. It only has a fraction of the features of the desktop version, and everything just feels dumbed down. Placing objects is clunky, and the non-teleportation movement options keep bugging out so you can't move straight forward for some reason.

The jobs are all pretty lame and repetitive, especially one mission that was just a "mystery" that involved moving a bookcase and zero renovations. Doubly so since another earlier job used the exact same bookcase-door trick. Most of the missions involve more cleaning then renovations as well, they should have called this "House Cleaning Simulator".

Honestly, I enjoyed the game at first, it was pretty relaxing. But I think a large part of it was that this was my first VR purchase so it still felt like a novelty. Unfortunately the game gets old fast, and I really regret wasting my money on it. Hopefully it'll get some updates to improve... well, anything and everything. Until then, don't bother with this.
I liked it at first but then when I started to play it was bad you Can’t move stuff with out something messing up and it is confusing and annoying
